author: Zevra
title: Looking for cutesy thumbnail artist
content: Looking for a cutesy thumbnail artist. I’m only looking for artist who cost less than 100. These are YouTube thumbnails kinda like dawkey YouTuber. Comment references

author: Mille Art
title: Looking for artist for model drawing
content: I am looking for an artist to help me get a model ready to rig :3 I don't have the biggest budget and I can rig the model myself, I just need someone to draw her up for me please!
